---
title: "Shannon Joyce"
description: "Contributor to nycOpenData and NYC Open Data Week 2026"
---

## Project

- [Toxic Homes: Exploring Mold Exposure Complaint and Domestic Violence Report Trends in NYC](../nyc-open-data-2026/06-ToxicHomes-Shannon.qmd)

## Links

-   [GitHub](https://github.com/shannonjoyce)\
-   [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/shannon-joyce-aba12a1b5/)\
-   [ORCID](https://orcid.org/0009-0000-5548-4952)
